title: KAWNG KHAR(BLOCK) CHUNGCHANGA HNAHTHIAL SP THUCHHUAH
content:
198/2026-2027

No SP (HNTL)/A-72/2026/230

**GOVERNMENT OF MIZORAM**

**OFFICE OF THE SUPERINTENDENT OF POLICE**

**HNAHTHIAL DISTRICT : MIZORAM**

Dated Hnahthial, the 17th April, 2026

N O T I F I C A T I O N

P&E control room, Electric veng, Hnahthial atanga Thingsai road panna kawng hi siam zawh hlim chauh anih avang leh kawngpui hi alo tlo zawk theih nan SDO, PWD, Hnahthial Sub Division-I chuan ziak in SP, Hnahthial hnenah Road block a rawn dil a. Helai kawng pawimawhtak hi tlo leh tha tak a nih theih nan Gov't of Mizoram Notification No.12021/10/2004/TRF Dt 27.5.2020 in Mv Act Sec 115 R/W Gov't of Mizoram, Home Department Memo No.A.19018/294/2008-HMP Dt 12th April,2022 hmang a lirthei tlandan tur khuahkhirhna siamthei tura thuneihna min pek angin kei a hnuaia hming sign tu hian Dt.18.04.2026(Inrinni) atanga 25.04.2026 (Inrinni) thleng a hnuai ami ang hian lirthei tlan dan tur chungchangah thupek ka siam e.

1. Helai kawngah hian MMV leh HMV (407 Truck chin leh a aia lian) chin te chu tlan phal a ni lo. Amaherawhchu, LMV chin leh ahnuai lam chu tlan phalsak an ni.

2. Thingsai lama kal tur lirthei MMV leh HMV (407 Truck chin leh a aia lian) lirtheite chu Thingsai road-ah kal vek tur a ni.

Tin, he thupek hian he office notification hmasa chu a thlak ang.

He thupek zawm lo te chu MV Act Section-179 hmangin an chungah action lak a ni ang.

Sd/-

(SHIVAM SIDDHARTH) IPS

Superintendent of Police

Hnahthial District: Mizoram

No SP (HNTL)/A-72/2026/230

Dated Hnahthial, the 17th April, 2026

title: Champhai leh Khawzawl damdawi zuarte tan Drug Awareness Campaign buatsaih
content:
197/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 17th April 2026 :Nimin khan Champhai leh Khawzawl District-a Damdawi zawrh theihna License neitute tan I&PR Auditorium, CHANEM-ah Drug Awareness Campaign buatsaih a ni.

He hunah hian Pu F. Lalliantluanga, Controlling & Licensing Authority, DHS, MINECO, Aizawl chuan khuallian ni-a hun hmanpuiin thu a sawi a, damdawi zawrh hi sumdawnna a nih rualin mipui rawngbawlna a nih thu a sawi a, dik taka hralh chuan hlawk em em ni lo mahse, taima taka an inzawrh phawt chuan hlawkna tam zawk pawh an chan theih thu a sawi. Damdawi zuar tharte pawh damdawi zuar tura an rilru an siam fel tawh ro ro a nih chuan theihtawp chhuah turin a fuih a, license cancel sak ngai a awm lo turin a chah bawk. Hun rei tak eizawnna atana lo hmang tawhte anga eizawnna ngelnghet tak nei thei tura theih tawp chhuah turin a sawm bawk.

Damdawi zawrh hi sumdawnna dang nen a inan loh thu a sawi a, mihring nunna chhan theihna leh tihtawp theihna a ni tih hre reng turin damdawi zuartute a chah a, mi tam takin damdawi zawrh theihna license an duh tih sawiin an kal fuh a nih chuan an damchhung atan eizawnna ngelnghet a nih theih thu a sawi.

Vantlang mipuite hriselna atan damdawi zuartute an pawimawh tih sawiin doctor rawn kher lo pawha mipuiten an pan thin chu damdawi zuarte an nih thin avangin mipuite hriselna kawnga a pawimawh berte zing ami an nih thu a sawi a, chutihrual chuan Doctor lehkha tel lova dawrtute duh ang damdawi zawng zawng pek vek thin a him loh thu leh dan phal loh a nih thu sawiin mipuite duh ang ang lo pek hi an hriselna atan pawh thil pawi leh thihna hial thleng thei a nih avangin damdawi zuartute an fimkhur a ngaih thu a sawi. Doctor te damdawi chawh ngei pawh uluk taka chhiar chiang thin tura fuihin Drug Rules te ngai pawimawh a, zawm tlat turin a chah a, damdawi lem leh a tak hriat hran theih dan leh damdawi zuartute tana hriattur pawimawh tak tak a tarlang bawk.

Khualzahawm Dr. R. Lalnienga, CMO, Champhai pawhin thu sawiin Drug License neite an pawimawh thu sawiin mi nazawngin damdawi an zawrh ve theih loh zuartu an ni, a ti a, thuawih erawh an mamawh hle, a ti. Khawvel pumah India chu Damdawi siamchhuak tam pathumna a nih mek thu leh a damdawi siamchhuah pawh a tha ber pawl a nih thu a sawi a, chung damdawi chu phalna neia zuar thei an nih thu hre reng tur leh hotuten damdawi hralh dan tura dan leh dun an siam te zawm turin a chah bawk.

He hun hi Pi Zarzokimi, Asst. Drug Inspector (Food & Drugs) CMO Office Champhai chuan kaihruaiin presentation a pe nghal a, a ni bakah hian Pi C. Ramdinmawii, Deputy Director (Food & Drugs), DHS, MINECO, Aizawl pawhin presentation a pe ve bawk.

title: CHAMPHAIAH VILLAGE COUNCIL PARIAT TE HNENAH COMPUTER HLAN A NEIH A NI
content:
196/2026-2027

Champhai, dated 17th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan District Local Administration Officer (DLAO) Pu James Lalnithanga chuan Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) hnuaiah Champhai District chhunga Village Council (VC) pariat hnenah Computer set a hlan a, The Mizoram (Village Councils) Act, 2025 a buin a semchhuak nghal bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Pu James Lalnithanga chuan thu sawiin tunlai khawvelah thiamna a san tawh avangin khawpui chauh ni lo, khaw te zawk thleng pawha 'e-governance' hman a pawimawh tawh zia a sawi a. RGSA scheme hnuaia computer sem te hian khawtlang inrelbawlna leh VC te hmasawnna hnathawh hrang hrang record vawnna kawngah nasa takin VC-te a puih a beisei thu a sawi a. Computer-te hi sawrkarin VC-te tana a pek a nih avangin uluk taka enkawl tur leh, rorelna a lo inthlak pawha in hlan chhawn leh tlaka enkawla hmang turin VC-te a chah a.Pu James Lalnithanga chuan VC inkaihhruaina The Mizoram(Village Councils) Act, 2025 chu Mizo tawng ngeia ziah a ni a, felfai zawka an khawtlang inrelbawlnaa an kalpui theih theina turin uluk taka zirchiang turin a chah bawk a ni.

Vawiina Village Councils computer dawngtu te hi Champhai Bethel Veng, Champhai Venglai, Tuipui, Champhai Vengsang, Selam, N. Diltlang, Lungphunlian, leh Vaikhawtlang te an ni a,  he hmalakna hian khawtlang rorelnaa tihchangtlun bakah sorkar hmalakna hrang hrangte tluang zawk leh felfai zawka kalpui a nih theihna tur atana ruahhman a ni. RGSA hnuaiah hian VC Council sawmthum te hnenah Computer set hi hlan a lo ni tawh bawk a ni.

title: Champhaiah ATMA leh Fishery Department-ten Sangha Khawitute Training pe
content:
195/2026-2027

Champhai, dated 17th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Champhaiah Agricultural Technology Management Agency (ATMA), Champhai District leh District Fishery Development Office tangkawp chuan Champhai Vengsang-a District Agriculture Conference Hall-ah sangha khawitu te tan tunlai thiamna hmang Sangha khawi dan zirtirna an buatsaih a ni.

He hun hi Dr. R. Zosangkima, Block Technology Manager (ATMA) chuan kaihruaiin, Pi Lalremsangpuii, District Fishery Development Officer chuan "Efficient Fish Farming with Biofloc: Training for Modern Intensive Aquaculture System" tih thupui hmangin sangha vulh dan thiamna thar leh changkang zawk chungchang a zirtir a ni. Chawhma lamah theory an zir a, chawhnu lamah Pu J. Lalbiakthanga sangha dil, Zotlang-ah practical training an neih chhunzawm a ni.

Vawiin Sangha khawi training-ah hian sangha khawitu mi 20 kalin he training hi eizawnna atana hlawk thlak leh tangkai an tih thu an sawi a ni.

Attachment

title: Lunglei District-ah Agriculture Department-in DPI Drone Survey an kalpui mek
content:
194/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 17 :Digital Agriculture Mission (DAM) hnuaia Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI) kal tlangin Agriculture & Farmers' Welfare Department chuan tun lai hian Lunglei District chhungah drone hmanga huan lo ram leh thlai chin chanchin zir chianna, Drone Survey an kalpui mek.

Lunglei District Agriculture Office chuan April ni 14, 2026 (Thawhlehni) aṭang khan drone survey hi kalpui ṭanin, vawiin khan Lunglei District-a Ṭawipui North-I khuaah drone survey hi chhunzawm a ni a. Ṭawipui North-I huam chhung Digital Crop Survey hnuaiah hian plot area 150.17 awmin, Drone Team hian Ṭawipui North-I-ah hian square kilometre 34.7-a zau buh leh thlai chinna ram (agricultural land) tuam thei tura ngaih a ni.

Lunglei District Agriculture Office hotute chuan sawrkar laipuiin Union Budget (2023–2024) a lo duan tawh angin Digital Technology hmanga department hrang hrang – Finance, Healthcare, Education leh Retail-ah te sawrkarin hma a lak zung zung theih nan programme hrang hrang duangin, hma lakna kalpui mek zel a nih thu an sawi a. Hemi bawhzui nan hian Agriculture hnuaiah data fel tak a awm theih nan, Digital Agriculture Mission hnuaiah Digital Public Infrastructure chu kalpui mek a nih thu leh Farmer Registry, Digital Crop Survey, Digital General Crop Estimation Survey (DGCES) leh IT-enabled System thuam chak te kalpui mek a nih thu an sawi a. Hemi hnuaiah hian lo neitu (farmer)-te leh an huan lo ram te, an thlai chin zawng zawngte chanchin kimchang thei ang ber lak khawm tum niin, hei hi Digital Public Infrastructure hnuaia Agriculture data kimchang tak chhawp chhuah theihna tur a nih thu an sawi.

District Agriculture hotute chuan Digital Public Infrastructure hnuaiah Mizorama lo neitute'n hamṭhatna an dawn ve theih nan Mizoram sawrkar chuan Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers' Welfare, Government of India nen Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) an ziah thu leh Project hming atan "Developing Digital Agriculture Infrastructure in Mizoram" tih hmangin DAM Scheme chu kalpui mek a nih thu sawiin, he project hnuaiah hian Mizoram district hrang hrangah Agriculture and Allied hnuaia hna thawhte Drone-based Survey kalpui a nih thu an sawi a. Drone Survey hi phase hrang hranga kalpui tur a nih thu leh tun dinhmunah sawrkar laipuiin Phase-I chhungah square kilometre 1,000-a zau chu Drone Survey atan a pawmpui (approve) tawh thu an sawi bawk.

Drone-based Survey atan hian M/s Theta Enerlytics Pvt. Ltd, New Delhi te nen thawk ho turin ruahmanna siam niin, Drone Team hian ṭha taka hna an thawh theih nan Agriculture, Horticulture, Animal Husbandry & Veterinary, Fisheries, Sericulture, Land Resources and Soil & Water Conservation Department hnuaia thlai chinna ram (cultivated land) hrang hrangte KML files hmang turin phalna pek tawh an ni a. Drone Survey hi Serchhip, Kolasib leh Mamit District-ah te kalpui tawh niin, square kilometre 700-a zau cultivated land survey zawh fel tawh a ni.

Land Revenue & Settlement Department chuan lo leh huan (agriculture land) te digitized Records of Rights (RoRs) a awm theih nan survey nei turin ruahmanna an siam bawk a. RoRs hi Farmer Registry atan document neih ngei ngei ngai a nih vangin survey hi kalpui tura ruahman a ni.

Attachment

title: BDO BUNGTLANG SOUTH HOVIN INHLANTHARNA NEI
content:
193/2026-2027Lawngtlai, 17th April 2026:Vawiin khan Pu Lalthanzuala, BDO Bungtlang South hovin BDO Conference Hall - ah Inhlantharna leh inhmel hriattirna neih a ni a, Pu F. VL Hmingmianpuia, APO chuan hun a kaihruai.

Pu Laltuanzuala chuan NGO's, VC's, Head of Department, Head of Institution leh Kohhran hruaitute hena lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a. Block hmasawnna tura theihtawp chhuah a tum thu sawiin, hemi kawnga tha taka thawkpuiah kalkhawmte leh mipuite a sawm a. Sawrkar hmalakna kawng hrang hrangah mipuiten dikna chanvo an neihna tur leh dik leh tha taka hnathawh chu tihmakmawh a nih thu tarlangin, langtlang taka hnathawh a nih tur thu a sawi a. Khawtlang hmasawnna tura mamawh an neih hrang hrangte a hnena thlen fo tura chahin, hmasawnna tura thawhpuiah a sawm nghal bawkm

Hun hmannaah hian sawm bik te an kal tha hle a, Department leh Institution hrang hrang atang bakah Khawtlang hrautute leh Kohhran lam atangin harsatna leh mamawh an neih te sawiho a ni a. A bik takin faina chungchangah hmalak tur a tam hle tih lawm tlangin, tha tak a thawhho ni se an ti a. Hmasawnna tur hnathawh kawng hrang hrangte chu mipuite duh dan leh rilrem zawnga kalpui nei se tiin, theih ang anga thawhho zel ni se an ti a ni.

Attachment

title: MAMIT MIPUITE HRIATTIRNA
content:
191/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 17th of April,2026 :Mamit Multipurpose building hnuai a dawr pakhat (Shop No. 4) chu a luah tura ruahmante'n an luah chhunzawm theih loh avangin a ruak a. A luah duh tur chuan an luah ngamna zat (Rs. 4,000/- per month aia hniam lo) leh zawrh tur (item) chiang taka ziakin, envelope-a daha charin, Secretary, District Sports Committee Mamit/SDO (S) DC Office Mamit hnenah Office hun chhungin Ni 23 April, 2026 (Ningani) ral hma-in dilna theh luh theih a ni. Tender hi Ni 24 April, 2026 chawhnu dar 4:00 PM-ah SDO (S) room, DC Office Mamit-ah hawn a ni ang a, chhanna zat inang a awm a nih chuan thumvawr a ni ang.TERMS & CONDITION FOR RENTING OF STALL.I. Dawr luah theih hun chhung:DSC in tender chhuahin a luahtu tur a zawng thin ang. Luah theih hun chhung hi kum 2 a ni ang a, kum 2 hnuah a tharin ennawn thin a ni ang.Dawr luah tura thlanten security deposit Rs 3,000/- (cheng sangthum) an pe ngei ngei tur a ni. He Security Deposit hi bill hrang hrang ba a awmin leh Dawr luahtu fimkhur loh avanga Dawr chhia a awmin hman thin a ni ang.II. General terms & conditions:a) Dawr luah man hi pek lawk thin tur a ni, thla tin thla thar ni 10 ral hma-in DC Office, Mamit ah luah man hi a chhung lut thin ang. Hun tiam chhunga pek a nih loh chuan, nitin Rs 10/- zelin a pung ang.b) Dawr luah tura thlante'n mi dang an luah chhawntir phal a ni lo.c) Bill pek ngai (eg: tui, electric etc) a awm a nih chuan a luahtu in a chawi ang.d) A luahtu hian term laklawhah a nghak chhunzawm thei dawn lo a nih chuan a chhuahsan hma thla khat talah DSC-ah hriattirna a pe hmasa tur a ni.f) Dawr chhung leh a vel fai takin a vawng tur a ni a, bawlhhlawlh leh hnawmhnawk sawngbawl leh senghawi chungchangah Sawrkar leh khawtlang ruahmanna tha tak a zawm tur a ni.g) Repair leh khawih danglam dawnin DSC hriatpuina/phalna lak hmasak tur a ni.h) Ruih theih thil leh Sawrkar phal loh thil zawrh phal a ni lo. Tin, vantlang mit tikham zawnga awm loh tur a ni. Zu leh ruihhlo dang lakah a nghaktu hi a fihlimin customer-te pawh dawr leh a velah hetiang laka fihlim turin a hriattir thin tur a ni a.i) A nghaktu chu DSC mit a tlung lo a nih a, dan siamte a zawm tha lo a nih chuan DSC-in thla khat hun pein an luah hun a titawp thei ang.j) A nghaktu chuan a dawr enkawl chungchangah harsatna a neih chuan DSC-ah a report thin tur a ni ang a, a rang thei ang berin DSC-in a harsatna a sutkian sak thin ang.k) Light bulb leh electric thil an luah laia a chhia a nih chuan a luahtute'n an siam tha ang.Issued by, District Information & Public Relations Office:Mamit District, Mamit, 2026

title: AIZAWL MUNICIPAL CORPORATION (AMC), 2026 INTHLANPUI NEIH TURA POLLING PERSONNEL TE  LEH SECTOR OFFICER TE TAN TRAINING BUATSAIH
content:
189/2026-2027

Aizawl, 17th April, 2026: Vawiin khan Institute of Advance Studies in Education(IASE), Republic vengah kar leh Tuesday( 21/04/2026)-a  General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation (AMC), 2026 neih tura Sector Officer leh polling personnel  te tan District Election Officer (DEO) &District Municipal Election Officer (DMEO) office, Aizawl District in Training a buatsaih. Vawiin Training hi Presiding Officer (PRO) leh Polling Officer (PO) te tan chuan a vawi thumna leh final a ni.

Vawiin Final Training hi District Election Officer (DEO) leh District Municipal Election Officer (DMEO), Aizawl district ni bawk Er.Lalhriatpuia chuan tlawhin, trainees te fuihna thuchah a sawi. Er.Lalhriatpuia chuan Democracy ramah chuan Indona tih lohah chuan Inthlanpui hi ngaih pawimawh ber a ni thin thu sawiin; trainees te pawh Inthlanpui  pawimawh zia hretu vek an ni anga, AMC-2026 inthlanpui hi, inthlanna felfai, thianghlim, langtlang leh  tihsual awmlo( Faultless)  inthlanpui a nih theih nan theitawp chhuah turin Trainees te a fuih a. Final Training a ni tawh avanga, vawiin bak training hi a awm tawh dawn loh thu sawiin, hriatchian loh thil an nei chuan Master Trainer te zawh hre loh tur leh training chu bel taka thiam tum vek  turin a chah. Trainees te chu mahni inrintawkna nena an duty an hlen theuh theih nan an thil zir te an bel hle a pawimawh zia sawiin, tha taka an duty an hlenchhuah theih nan  duhsakna a hlan bawk.

Vawiin Training-ah hian Presiding Officers te chu Master Trainer: Pi Lalruatpuii Hnamte, MCS; Pi Esther Leihang, MCS; Pi Christina Lalmuanzuali, MSC; Pi F. Lanisai, MCS; Dr. Lalchamliani, MCS, Malsawmhriatzuali, MCS; Pu Ngurthansanga, MCS ten Poll Process & Election Forms, EVM (Theory & Hands-on) an zirtir a.

Polling parties te hi Master Trainer : Pu Obed Lalmalsawma, MCS; Pu Samuel Malsawmzuala, MCS; Pu Hmingmawizuala, MCS Pu Lalawmpuia, MCS; Pi Lalhriatpuii Phutin, MCS; Pu PC Lalrammuanpuia, MCS; Pu Lalrindika, MCS; Pu Lalthakima chhangte, MCS leh Pu VL Chaka Hmar, MCS ten an  zirtir ve thung.

Vawiinah vek hian Institute of Advance Studies in Education(IASE)-ah hian AMC,2026 inthlanpui atan a ruat Sector officer 8 te pawh Training pek an ni a. Training hi  Polling station 264 a duty tur,( reserve te nen) Presiding Officers, Polling Officers- I &II te bakah Sector officer ten an chhim a ni.

title: APEX BANK BOARD MEETING NEIH A NI
content:
188/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl: the 17 April 2026 : Vawiin khan Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. Board of Directors Meeting chu Pu Lalnunsanga,  Chairman, Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank kaihhruaiin Board Meeting, Head Office-ah an thu  khawm.

Thutkhawmnaah hian Kum 2025 – 2026 Financial Year chhunga Bank sum dinhmun leh hmalakna  hrang hrang te Review Meeting neih a ni a. Hemi rual hian loan chi hrang hrang – Biak In loan,  Handholding, Society loan leh mimal loan chi hrang hrang, a vaiin cheng nuai 2254 chu pek remtih  nghal a ni a. Mizoram chhunga PACS hrang hrang enzui leh enkawltu committee te din a ni a.  Khawpui chhunga mipui ten Bank pan kher lova sum nitin an khawl theih na tura pawisa lamtu -  Pigmy Deposit Collector dilna pawh pawmpui nghal a ni bawk.

Financial Year (31.03.2025 atanga 31.03.2026) chhunga Apex bank dinhmun tlangpui chu;- Branch – 35, ATM – 45, Deposit  cheng vaibelchhe 1930, Loan cheng vaibelchhe 1272, Total Business cheng vaibelchhe 3202, Profit  cheng vaibelchhe 40, CD Ratio 69% leh Net NPA 0.43% te a ni. Meeting chuan hetianga Bank  ngelnghet tak a nih theihna atana tha thawhtu staff-te leh Mizo Bank ti a dawr tlattu Mizo mipuite  chungah lawmthu a sawi a ni.

Attachment

title: MINISTRY OF TRIBAL AFFAIRS HNUAIA NGO/VO TE TANA GRANT DIL THEIH HUN CHHUNG BITHLIAH A NI
content:
187/2026-2027

Kolasib, 17th April, 2026 :Ministry of Tribal Affairs (MoTA), Government of India chuan Scheduled Tribes (ST) te hamthatna atana hma la tu NGO leh Voluntary Organisation (VO) te hnenah 'Aid to Voluntary Organizations Working for the Welfare of Scheduled Tribes' scheme hnuaiah Grant-in-Aid a pe thin a. He grant dilna leh endik kawngah hian tlai (delay) a awm fo thin avangin MoTA chuan FY 2026-27 atana project kal lai mek (ongoing projects) te tan hun tiam (timeline) khauh tak a siam thar.

MoTA hriattirna ang hian, he scheme hnuaia project kal lai mek (31st March 2026 thlenga grant la mek) te chuan an dilna (application) chu **NGO Grants Portal-ah ni 30th April, 2026** ral hmain an thehlut ngei tur a ni.

He hun tiam chhung hian dilna thehluh theih nan portal hi a inhawng ang a, hun a tawp hnuah erawh chuan eng thil ah pawh  portal hi hawn nawn a ni tawh dawn lo a ni. Portal khar hma a thehlut hman lo te chu ngaihtuah sak an ni tawh lo ang. NGO ten dilna an thehluh hnu hian District Authority ten uluk takin an endik (scrutiny leh physical inspection) ang a, chumi hnuah State sawrkar ah thehluh chhunzawm a ni dawn a ni.

Chuvangin, Kolasib District chhunga NGO leh VO he scheme hnuaia tanpuina la mek te chu, hun tiam ral hmaa NGO Grants Portal-a dilna thehlut vek turin ngen leh hriattir an ni e.

title: KHAWZAWL KVK-IN TOMATO CHING TURTE TAN TRAINING BUATSAIH
content:
186/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 17th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan KVK Khawzawl chuan KVK Training Hall-ah Khawzawl khaw chhunga tomato chinga hma la turte hnenah training an pe a. He hun hi Dr. Malsawmkimi, Senior Scientist leh Head, KVK ni bawk chuan a kaihruai a, zirtirna a pe nghal bawk.

Pi R. Vanlalduati, Subject Matter Specialist,(Soil Sc.) KVK Khawzawl chuan he huna lo kalkhawmte hnenah leitha inbuktawk lo pekin a nghawng tha lo thleng theite sawiin zirtirna a pe bawk a. Indian Institute of Horticulture Research (IIHR) -NEH Scheme hnuaiah tomato chi leh thlai chi dangte bakah an thlai chinte an enkawl zuina tur an sem chhuak nghal bawk.

Attachment

title: WCD IN STATE CONSULTATION MEET ON MATERNAL HEALTH, CHILD HEALTH & EARLY CHILDHOOD STIMULATION BUATSAIH
content:
185/2026-2027

Aizawl, April ni 17, 2026:Vawiin khan Women & Child Development chuan Poshan Pakhwada 2026 hman mek kal zelah, ‘State Consultation Meet on Maternal Health, Child Health & Early Childhood Stimulation’ an hmang.

He Progamme-ah hian Health & Family Welfare Department, AYUSH, DIET, MZU (Psychology Dept & Dept of Clinical Psychology), Child Guidance Centre & Women & Child Development-te kalkhawmin. Kalkhawm ațang hian Mithiam hrang hrangte leh Department hrang hrang ațangin a thupui chungchang sawizauna neiin, Mizoram dinhmun thlirhona leh, hmalak zel dan tur zirhona hun neih a ni a. Maternal Health lama hmasawnna tur leh hmalak ngaihna te, Naupang hriselna, Early Stimulation leh Screen en tam, phone khawih tam chungchanga hmasawnna leh a enkawl dan zirho a ni.

Chawhnu lamah Group Session awm lehin thupui pawimawh tak tak sawihona hun neih leh a ni a,

He Programme hi Pi Sailopari, Joint Director Women & Child Development-in a kaihruai a. Pi Zoramthangi Chhangte, Director Women & Child Development chuan he programme khuhhawnna hun a hmang a, kalkhawmte lawmna leh a programme pawimawhzia a sawi a. Group discussion khaikhawmna leh lawmthu sawina Pi Sailopari, Joint Director-in a hmang a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM GOVERNOR FLAGS OFF AMBULANCE FOR SILSURY VILLAGE IN MAMIT ASPIRATIONAL DISTRICT
content:
27/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 17th April, 2026:Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), today flagged off a Basic Life Support Ambulance procured under the CSR fund of NBCC (India) Ltd. The ambulance is designated to serve Silsury Village, located along the Indo-Bangladesh border in Mamit Aspirational District. The short flag-off ceremony was held at the Upper Lawn of Lok Bhavan in Aizawl.

Addressing the gathering, the Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh emphasised the need for balanced development, with special focus on infrastructure in international and state border areas. “These border areas require a lot of attention and ultimately, the people living there are the ones who suffer the most,” he said. He expressed appreciation to NBCC (India) Ltd., for donating a well-equipped ambulance to Silsury Village, describing it as one of the critical healthcare needs of border villages.

The Governor commended NBCC for the dynamism it has brought to its operations and urged the company to utilise its best practices and advanced technology to improve the living standards of people in a small state like Mizoram. He also highlighted the Central Government’s focus on Aspirational Districts and called upon NBCC to continue prioritising the development needs of people residing in border areas, given the company’s significant role in border infrastructure projects.

Dr. R. Lalthangliana, MLA of Dampa Assembly Constituency, described the ambulance as a welcome gift for Silsury Village and the surrounding areas in Mamit Aspirational District. He thanked NBCC (India) Ltd., and expressed hope that the well-equipped ambulance would be put to genuine and effective use by the local community.

The programme was chaired by Mr. Gyanaranjan Samal, CGM and Head of the North East Region, NBCC, who highlighted various initiatives and achievements of the company. Mr. Debasish Satapathy, Executive Director (HRM) & Head of CSR, NBCC, conveyed his gratitude and assured that the company would continue to successfully implement other CSR project proposals received from the state.

Among those present were Mr. Ajit Roy, Secretary to the Governor, Mr. Suvigya S. Chandra, Deputy Commissioner of Mamit District, other senior NBCC officials and leaders from Silsury Village.

NBCC (India) Ltd., was incorporated in 1960 and operates as a Public Sector Undertaking (PSU) under the Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs, Govt. of India. The company functions as a Project Management Consultant (PMC) and is actively involved in executing large-scale infrastructure development projects of the Central Government.

In Mizoram, out of the 189 km of Indo-Bangladesh border fencing sanctioned, NBCC has already completed 98 km, with the remaining work currently in progress in Lawngtlai District. Recently, the company handed over 55 km of border fence and 5 Border Outposts (BOPs) in the Dampa Tiger Reserve Forest area in Mamit District.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM LARSAP-IN MAMIT ASPIRATIONAL DISTRICT-A AWM SILSURY TANA HMAN TUR AMBULANCE A VAILIAM
content:
184/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 16th April, 2026:Mizoram Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan vawiin khan India leh Bangladesh ramri depa awm Silsury khua, Mamit Aspirational District tana hman tur Ambulance, NBCC (India) Ltd., CSR Fund kaltlanga lei chu Lok Bhavan, Aizawl atangin a vailiam.

Hemi puala inkhawm tawi Lok Bhavan Upper Lawn-a buatsaihah Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan rualkhai taka hmasawnna kalpui turin ram dang leh state thenawmte nena inrinaah hmasawnna ruhrel siam ngaih pawimawh a tul tih sawiin, heng hmunte hi ngaihven zual a ngai a, anih loh chuan mipuite bawkin an tuar thin a ni, a ti a. Ramri depa khaw awm Silsury-in a tangkai pui tur Ambulance tha tak NBCC te'n an pe chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

Larsap chuan NBCC-ah danglamna leh hmasawnna nasa tak a hmuh thu sawiin, an thiamna leh theihnate chu Mizorama chengte tihhmasawn nana hman tum turin a chah a. Sawrkar laipuiin district hnufual 'Aspirational District' te a ngaih pawimawh thu sawiin, NBCC-te chu ramria hmasawnna ruhrel thawk  nasa an nih avangin, ramri depa chengte mamawh leh hmasawnna turte ngaipawimawh zel turin a chah nghal bawk.

Thusawitu dang Dampa bialtu MLA Dr. R. Lalthangliana chuan Mamit Aspirational District chhunga awm Silsury khuaa chengte hman tur Ambulance dawn a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, a petu NBCC-te chungah lawmthu a sawi a. Ambulance changtlung tak chu tangkai taka Silsury leh a chhehvel khuate'n an hman ngei theih nan duhsakna a hlan a ni.

He hun hi Pu Gyanaranjan Samal, CGM, Head, North East Region, NBCC chuan kaihruaiin NBCC hmalakna hrang hrangte a tarlang a. Pu Debasish Satapathy, Executive Director (HRM) & Head, CSR, NBCC chuan lawmthu sawiin, NBCC-a dilna lut dangte pawh a hlawhtlin ngei theih nan theihtawp chhuaha an bawhzui zel tur thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian Pu Ajit Roy, Secretary to Governor, Pu Suvigya S Chandra, Deputy Commisioner, Mamit District, NBCC oficial dangte leh Silsury khawtlang hruaitute an tel a ni.

NBCC (India) Ltd., hi 1960 ah din niin, Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs, Govt. of India hnuaia Public Sector Undertaking (PSU) company a ni a. Project Management Consultant (PMC) niin, Sawrkar laipui hnuaia hmasawnna ruhrel lian tak takte an thawk thin a ni.

Mizoramah chuan India leh Bangladesh ramri hung hna thawkin, thawh tur bituk an pek 189 km atangin 98 km an zo fel tawh a, hmabak dang awmte Lawngtlai District-ah an thawk mek a. Tunhnai khan Mamit District chhung Dampa Tiger Reserve Forest area-a ramri hung hna an zawh fel tawh 55 km a thui leh Border Outpost (BOP) 5 te chu a enkawl tur hnenah an hlan fel tawh a ni.

title: NHIDCL KAWNG SIAM DAWN AVANGIN LIRTHEI LIAN (MMV & HMV) TLAN DAN TUR CHUNGCHANGA KOLASIB SP THUCHHUAH
content:
183/2026-2027

17th April, 2026 :Mizoram State Sawrkar Notification No. B. 12021/10/2004-TRP dt. 01.06.2020 leh Section 115 of Motor Vehicle Act 1988 (Act No. 59 of 1988)-in thuneihna a pek angin leh General Manager (P) NHIDCL Kolasib ngenna angin Pu Lalrinpuia Varte, Superintendent of Police, Kolasib District chuan a hnuaia mi ang hian thupek a chhuah.

NHIDCL hnuaia contractor te chuan a hnuaia hun leh hmun tarlan ang hian ni 18.04.2026 atanga ni 02.05.2026 chhungin National Highway 06 (Keicham leh Kharzawl inkar) kawngpui siamthat hna an thawh dawn avangin hnathawh hun chhungin helai kawng hi lirthei lian MMV & HMV (407 chin chunglam te tan) khar/block a ni dawn tih mipuite inhriattir a ni e.

Kawng khar hun leh hmun ruahman dan:

* Kawngpui kharin a huam chin:

Rengtekawn atanga Buchangphai Peng, Bilkhawthlir inkar.

* Kawng khar ni tur:

Ni 18.04.2026 atanga 02.05.2026.

* Kawng khar hun chhung:

Zing dar 09:00 AM atanga Tlai dar 05:00 PM.

Kawng khar/block hun chhung hian lirthei MMV & HMV (407 chin chunglam te tan) a chhuk lam leh chho lam te chu Rengtekawn atanga Buhchangphai / Phaipheng road-ah an tlan tur a ni ang. Kharzawl leh Buhchangphai Peng inkar kawng siam a nih chhung hian Vairengte atanga lo chho lirthei MMV chin chunglam te chu Dochhuma Hmun ah dan (block) a ni ang a, Silchar lam pan lirthei MMV chin chunglam te chu Buhchangphai peng, Bilkhawthlir ah dan (block) a ni ang.

He thuchhuah chungchanga harsatna neite chuan IC Bilkhawthlir OP (Ph. No. 9862316186) leh IC Traffic Cell, Kolasib (Ph. No. 9862306914) ah te biak theih reng an ni

He thupek zawm lote chu Section 179 MV Act hmanga hrem an ni ang.

title: SERCHHIPAH ECCE FESTIVAL AND INDIGENOUS TOYS DAY HMAN A NI
content:
182/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 17th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Women and Child Development Department hnuaia Serchhip ICDS Project buatsaihin 8th Poshan Pakhwada hnuaiah 'Early Childhood Care and Education Festival and Indigenous Toys Day' hman a ni.

Serchhip Kawnpui VC Hall-ah hun hman niin hun hmanpuitu Serchhip RD Block-a Block Development Officer (BDO) Dr. Lalramdinthara chuan zir mite'n an sawi danin, naupangte thluak hi kum 6 an tlin hmain an damchhunga an thluak than dan tur zaa 85 a than hman tawh thu a sawi a; amaherawhchu kan enkawl that loh leh kan kaihhruai that tawk loh avangin an nih tur ang ni phak lo an awm theih thu sawiin, kawng hrang hranga hma an sawn theihna turin heng Poshan Pakhwada hmalaknate hi duan a nih thu a sawi a. Naupang kaihhruai dan hrang hrang ICDS-a thawkte'n an sawi leh zirtir thinte chu hmang tangkai theuh turin, he huna kalkhawm nute chu a chah bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Serchhip ICDS Project-a Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) Pi Caryll Lalpari pawhin kum tin Poshan Abhiyan hnuaiah Programme pawimawh tak tak pahnih an hman thin thu sawiin, kumin hian April 9 atanga 23 chhungin 'Poshan Pakhwada' hi hmangin September thla-ah Rashtriya Poshan Maah an hman leh dawn thu a sawi a. Tuna Poshan Pakhwada an hman meka hmalakna an kalpui tur hrang hrangte a sawi bawk.

Vawiina he hun hman hi Serchhip ICDS Project-a Circle Officer (CO), Pu Lalhriatkima chuan kaihruaiin inelna hrang hrang neih a ni a, naupang kum khat hnuai lam tan Baby Crawling, kum hnih hnuai lam naupang hrisel, kum khat atanga kum thum inkar tan leh kum thum atanga kum ruk inkar tan Quadrupedal race buatsaih niin, Govt. Serchhip College zirlaite'n TLM Toys Making Competition an nei bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWL WILDLIFE DIVISION HMALAKNA-IN RAINBOW ROOSTER AR NO SEM CHHUAH A NI
content:
181/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 17th April, 2026 :Nimin khan Khawzawl Wildlife Division hmalaknain Rabung, Tualpui leh Khualenkhu-ah te Rainbow rooster ar no 3000 sem chhuah a ni a. Hei hi Murlen National Park hnuaia Eco-Development Activity, CSS - IDWH Scheme hnuai aṭanga kalpui a ni.

Heng khaw pathum aṭang hian chhungkaw 60 hnenah ar note 50 zel sem chhuah a ni a, a dawngtu chhungkuate hi khaw tina Eco-Development Committee-ten an thlanchhuah te an ni. Eco-Development Committee-ah hian Khawtlang hruaitute - VC, YMA, MHIP, MUP leh Forest Department aiawh te an tel a ni. He hmalakna hian a tum ber chu Protected Area chhunga ramngaw leh nungchate an lo him leh zual theih nan leh mihringin an chenna hmun kan nek chep zel lohna tur atana ruahmanna a ni.

He Programme kaltlang hian ar note 15000 chu Murlen National Park leh Lengteng Wildlife Sanctuary hual veltu khua 13 hnenah sem chhuah tum a ni. Tun tum hi a thawkhatna a ni a, tum 5 chhungin sem zawhfel tum a ni. Ar note tluangtaka sem a nih theih nana a ṭul anga ruahmanna siamsaktu Khawzawl District Veterinary Office chungah Khawzawl Wildlife Division chuan lawmthu a sawi a ni.

Attachment
